ddls:
CREATE TABLE "registers" (
  "register_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each register */,
  "address" TEXT /* Hexadecimal address of the register */,
  "register_type" INTEGER /* Type of the register (e.g., VID_PID, VERSION, LITE_MODE) */,
  "access_permission" TEXT /* Access permission for the register (e.g., RO, RW) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the register */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Data type of the register (e.g., INT, FLOAT, BOOL) */,
  "default_value" TEXT /* Default value of the register */,
  "bit_width" INTEGER /* Bit width of the register */,
  "endianness" TEXT /* Endianness (big-endian or little-endian) */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last modification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("register_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_registers_register_type FOREIGN KEY ("register_type") REFERENCES register_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "register_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each register type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the register type (e.g., VID_PID, VERSION, LITE_MODE) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the register type */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the register type (e.g., Configuration, Status, Debug) */,
  "is_deprecated" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the register type is deprecated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "product_code" TEXT /* Unique code for the product */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the product */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the product is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product the version belongs to */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the product */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the version */,
  "build_number" TEXT /* Build number of the version */,
  "changelog" TEXT /* Changelog or release notes for the version */,
  "is_stable" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the version is stable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "register_versions" (
  "register_version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each register version */,
  "register_id" INTEGER /* ID of the register the version belongs to */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the version the register belongs to */,
  "register_value" TEXT /* Value of the register in the version */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if this is the default version */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Additional comments or notes for the register version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("register_version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_register_versions_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES versions ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_register_versions_register_id FOREIGN KEY ("register_id") REFERENCES registers ("register_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, designer, administrator) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the user is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "register_id" INTEGER /* ID of the register being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the register */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the register was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., read, write) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the access */,
  "status_code" TEXT /* Status code of the access (e.g., success, error) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_register_id FOREIGN KEY ("register_id") REFERENCES registers ("register_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "register_access" (
  "register_access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each register access */,
  "register_id" INTEGER /* ID of the register being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the register */,
  "access_permission" TEXT /* Access permission for the register (e.g., RO, RW) */,
  "is_authorized" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the user is authorized to access the register */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date when the access permission expires */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("register_access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_register_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_register_access_register_id FOREIGN KEY ("register_id") REFERENCES registers ("register_id")
)
